data.description: The iShares Staked Ethereum Trust has announced that staking rewards will be distributed monthly from Ethereum validators managed by leading institutions like Figment, Galaxy Digital, and Attestant.

data.title: Bonterra Energy Announces Year-End 2025 Results and Reserves Evaluation; Achieves Record Annual Production
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Bonterra Energy Corp. (TSX: BNE; OTCID: BNEFF) announced its financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company reported achieving a record annual production during this period. An independent evaluation of oil and gas reserves known as the “Sproule Report” was highlighted, prepared by Sproule International Limited as of December 31, 2025. Interested parties can access the financial statements, notes, management’s discussion and analysis, and annual information form for the year ended December 31, 2025 on SEDAR at www.sedarplus.ca and on Bonterra’s website at www.bonterraenergy.com.
Cuba agrees to free 51 inmates following deal with the Vatican.
South Korea plans supplementary budget without new bond issuance to limit market impact, says finance ministry.

data.title: Indivior Prices Upsized $450.0 Million Convertible Senior Notes Offering
data.description: Indivior Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Richmond, Virginia, revealed the pricing details of its recent offering on March 12, 2026. The company priced $450,000,000 in convertible senior notes due 2031 (the “notes”) in a private offering to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933, increased from the initial $400,000,000. Additionally, Indivior granted the initial purchasers a 30-day option to buy up to an additional $50,000,000 principal amount of notes. The settlement of the notes sale with the initial purchasers is anticipated to occur on March 17, 2026, pending standard closing conditions.

data.title: MetaOptics Ships Automatic Metalens Tester to Taiwanese Partner Pin-Jye Nano Technologies
data.description: Enhancing Regional Testing Capacity and Backing Mass Production of Metalens SINGAPORE, March 12, 2026 - MetaOptics Ltd (Catalist: 9MT) announced the successful shipment of its Automatic Testing System for Metalens. This move marks a significant progress in strengthening regional testing capabilities and supporting the mass production of metalenses. The Company, along with its subsidiaries, has actively contributed to this achievement, showcasing its commitment to advancing optical technologies.

data.title: ALMAL Real Estate Development Appoints Wyndham Hotels & Resorts for The One by ALMAL Bali Nusa Dua, a Registry Collection Hotel
data.description: An announcement was made in Bali, Indonesia, about ALMAL Real Estate Development selecting Wyndham Hotels & Resorts to operate The One by ALMAL Bali Nusa Dua, slated to be a Registry Collection Hotel.
